title: Getting SEC DERA XBRL data
text: high-level update functions compare SEC source metadata metadata embedded local Parquet files. zip file downloaded SEC Last-Modified timestamp newer one expected Parquet files missing. replaces manual workflow downloading zip file, opening tab-delimited file, specifying column types, converting date fields, writing table Parquet. details still important, now live package table specifications update functions rather analysis script. update_dera() writes standard Financial Statement Data Set tables: sub, tag, num, pre. update_dera_notes() writes Financial Statement Notes tables: sub_notes, tag_notes, dim_notes, num_notes, txt_notes, ren_notes, pre_notes, cal_notes.

Typical metadata fields include: dera_dataset dera_source_file dera_source_url sec_last_modified last_modified last_modified_utc UTC field avoids false update decisions code run sessions different local time zones.

title: Getting SEC DERA XBRL data
text: created, Parquet files can read Arrow, DuckDB, Polars, tools. R, Arrow can open periods table wildcard-like file listing: Python Polars, repository can scanned using era_pl:
code: library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE) library(farr, warn.conflicts = FALSE) library(DBI)  db <- dbConnect(duckdb::duckdb())  sub_notes <- load_parquet(db, "sub_notes_*", "dera_notes")  sub_notes |>    arrange(desc(accepted)) |>    select(adsh, cik, name, form, accepted) from era_pl import load_parquet  sub_notes = load_parquet("sub_notes_*", "dera_notes")  (   sub_notes   .sort("accepted", descending=True)    .select("adsh", "cik", "name", "form", "accepted")   .show() )

text: data_dir Root local Parquet repository. omitted, resolved using dera_data_dir(). user_agent Optional SEC-compliant user agent. omitted, resolved using dera_user_agent(). quiet TRUE, suppress progress messages. cache TRUE, cache downloaded zip files tools::R_user_dir("dera.pq", "cache"). string, use directory zip cache.
